data.title: check-referential-integrity.sh: broken contract reference test -> inverted exit code (test-check-referential-integrity.sh 5 failures)
data.description:
## Incident Overview
test-check-referential-integrity.sh test_broken_contract_reference fails with 'should NOT be: 0, actual: 0'. The script exits 0 when a broken contract reference is detected, but should exit non-zero. 5 failures total in this test file.
